root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as requestment_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ) ) - extract ( year from ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ) ) as age_year , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ) as id_card , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as position_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as group_district_name
, sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as district_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as province_name , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_payment_type_code
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount)::double precision) as mem_request_amount_thai
, ( SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description FROM sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj WHERE sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type AND sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code ) as loan_objective_code_desc
, pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount)::double precision) as period_payment_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount)::text) || 'งวด' as loan_installment_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount)::double precision) as last_payment_amount_thai , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , 'MONTH' ) as start_keep_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , 'YYYY' ) as start_keep_tyear
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_member_address , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status = sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no AND sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = '012054' --AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date = '4/3/2021' order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no

r_ktm_contract_by_conno_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ) as coll_name ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code ,( select collateral_description from sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type where collateral_type_code = sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code ) as collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll WHERE sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = '64ส00066' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ASC
